name: Spiced Orange Milk
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the orange juice, sugar, evaporated milk, and water in a pitcher.
2. Beat the egg yolks in a separate bowl.
3. Add the milk mixture to the beaten yolks.
4. In another clean bowl, beat the egg whites until stiff peaks form.
5. Gently fold the egg white mixture into the yolk mixture.
6. Serve the drink in tall glasses with ice.
7. Sprinkle with nutmeg before serving.
Serves 4.
